violations.description: CONTAMINATION BY EMPLOYEES (3 pts): Bare hand contact with ready to eat food noted not being avoided. Observed staff handle ready to eat food item without using a single use glove or utensil.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Cleaned and sanitized utensils noted being stored in such a way that the food or lip contact surfaces were being contaminated. Observed flatware being stored with handle downward in flatware bins and other utensils such as whisks spoons and other food prep utensils stored with the handles downward.
